ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the state */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the district */,
  "tehsil_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the tehsil */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "total_rural_urban" TEXT /* Type of area (Total, Rural, Urban) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group classification */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "total_population_males" INTEGER /* Total male population count */,
  "total_population_females" INTEGER /* Total female population count */,
  "population_attending_educational_institutions" INTEGER /* Total population attending educational institutions */,
  "population_attending_educational_institutions_males" INTEGER /* Male population attending educational institutions */,
  "population_attending_educational_institutions_females" INTEGER /* Female population attending educational institutions */,
  "literacy_rate" TEXT /* Literacy rate of the area */,
  "net_enrollment_ratio" TEXT /* Net enrollment ratio of the area */,
  "dropout_rate" TEXT /* Dropout rate of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_tehsil_code FOREIGN KEY ("tehsil_code") REFERENCES tehsils ("tehsil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("district_code") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational institution record */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the state */,
  "district_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the district */,
  "tehsil_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the tehsil */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "type_institution" TEXT /* Type of educational institution (School, College, Vocational, etc.) */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance count */,
  "attendance_males" INTEGER /* Total male attendance count */,
  "attendance_females" INTEGER /* Total female attendance count */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "institution_address" TEXT /* Address of the educational institution */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the educational institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_institutions_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_institutions_tehsil_code FOREIGN KEY ("tehsil_code") REFERENCES tehsils ("tehsil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_institutions_district_code FOREIGN KEY ("district_code") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range representing the age group (e.g., 0-4, 5-10, etc.) */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of institution */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution type (School, College, Vocational, Literacy Center, etc.) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the institution type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_stats" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender record */,
  "gender_type" TEXT /* Type of gender (Male, Female) */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the associated state */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "district_headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tehsils" (
  "tehsil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tehsil */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated district */,
  "tehsil_name" TEXT /* Name of the tehsil */,
  "tehsil_headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the tehsil */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tehsil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "literacy_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each literacy center record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated district */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance count at the literacy center */,
  "attendance_males" INTEGER /* Total male attendance count */,
  "attendance_females" INTEGER /* Total female attendance count */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the literacy center */,
  "center_address" TEXT /* Address of the literacy center */,
  "incharge_name" TEXT /* Name of the incharge */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the literacy center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_literacy_centers_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocational_institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocational institute record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated district */,
  "total_attendance" INTEGER /* Total attendance count at the vocational institute */,
  "attendance_males" INTEGER /* Total male attendance count */,
  "attendance_females" INTEGER /* Total female attendance count */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the vocational institute */,
  "institute_address" TEXT /* Address of the vocational institute */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the vocational institute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocational_institutes_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_logs" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the attendance record is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Count of attendees on that date */,
  "present_students" INTEGER /* Number of students present */,
  "absent_students" INTEGER /* Number of students absent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_logs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES educational_institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (Admin, Researcher, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the request */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
